description_for_human: Private Lunaris Craft admin data access for Microsoft Copilot in your organization.

functions.name: getLunarisStatus
functions.description: Checks whether the Lunaris Copilot API is online and configured.

functions.name: getLunarisSummary
functions.description: Gets top-level order, product, account, and promo counts.

functions.name: getLunarisOrders
functions.description: Gets recent Lunaris orders and can filter by status or username.

functions.name: getLunarisProducts
functions.description: Gets Lunaris ranks, keys, bundles, cosmetics, and other products.

functions.name: getLunarisAccounts
functions.description: Gets Lunaris customer accounts, verification status, spending, and last seen.

functions.name: getLunarisPromos
functions.description: Gets Lunaris promo codes, active state, and usage limits.

functions.name: searchLunarisData
functions.description: Searches orders, accounts, products, and promo codes in one request.
